caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, a dark green t-shirt with the white text "YOU NEVER DO SHIT" printed on it, and black headphones is speaking into a black professional microphone. He is in a room with walls adorned with numerous framed photographs and posters. Behind him to the right, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt and grey pants. A clothing rack with various garments and some furniture are also visible in the background. Small logos are present in the bottom corners of the scene, including one that reads "BIG" and another that reads "ROOKIE FLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he talks, while the background and equipment stay stationary.
